query:
SELECT a.id as aluno_id, a.name, ap.id as pdi_id, ap.trilhaId, t.name as trilha_nome, ap.status, ap.macroInicio, ap.macroTermino, 
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assessment_competencias ac WHERE ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id) as num_competencias
FROM alunos a 
JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ap.alunoId = a.id 
LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON t.id = ap.trilhaId
WHERE a.name LIKE '%Fabio%' OR a.name LIKE '%Fábio%'
ORDER BY a.name, ap.trilhaId, ap.createdAt;
